name: Stranded with the Good Sisters
description:
Traveling for your own reasons on a ship bound for Luanda in Angola, you nearly drown when the ship capsizes in a heavy storm. Now, you're stucked on a deserted island with a pair of nuns who were heading to Africa to do missionary work.

(version 1.0.1 - testing through release)

TW - none scripted. If things get weird, that's between you and a the LLM.

Why you were on the ship and heading to Luanda is up to you to decide.
creator: The Real Tom Frost
